methods.doc: Return index of the given element using references, or -1.

methods.name: IsStringArray
methods.doc: check if array is an array of string

methods.name: OrderBy
methods.doc: Sorts the elements of a sequence in ascending order by using a specified comparer.

param.name: comparer
param.doc: Function that compares two objects of the same type. Must return a signed integer that indicates the relative values of first param A and second param B. Value Less than 0 : A is less than B.Value 0 : A equals B.Value Greater than 0 : A is greater than B.It can also be a function that takes 1 parameter and returns a string or number.

methods.name: Randomize
methods.doc: Randomize the order of the elements in the current array. Multiple calls to this may return the same randomization, use a Random object to preserve randomization over multiple calls

properties.doc: Get/Set the caller id. Ensure you have legal rights to display this number. Set to empty to use the global default.

properties.name: ChanceForInterviewerNeeded
properties.doc: When using predictive, when cold-dialing the first couple of numbers what is the chance to get picked up. This determines how many predictive calls to make.

properties.name: ContactLimit
properties.doc: Maximum number of calls to a single qas, before being excluded.

properties.name: DialerType
properties.doc: Which dialer to use. 0 = Auto dial, 1 = Auto pick, but don't start dialing until user ok, 2 = Auto pick, but don't use Voip/Asterisk, 3 = Predictive dialing.

properties.name: Extra
properties.doc: Add some custom extra info.

properties.name: FirstPageQuestion
properties.doc: Get the html of the text shown on the first page of the questionnaire to display before qas is started.

properties.name: HighPriorityTimeFrameAfter
properties.doc: When scheduling a meeting/retry how many minutes after is it ok to pick, before picking other on-time appointments.

properties.name: HighPriorityTimeFrameBefore
properties.doc: When scheduling a meeting/retry how many minutes before is it ok to pick.

properties.name: MaxDialingThreads
properties.doc: When using predictive, how many maximum call attempts can happen at the same time.

properties.name: ObjectTypeName
properties.doc: The name of the type of object.

properties.name: OutcomeSet
properties.doc: Get the outcome set.

properties.name: PickTimeout
properties.doc: When call is finished, how long in seconds does the interviewer have to pick an outcome before it is picked automatically.

properties.name: SuccessPerHour
properties.doc: Number of expected successes an interviewer per hour is expected to do to get 100% performance. This can be altered throughout the duration of the project to reflect harder to get quotas.

properties.name: TimeoutExceed
properties.doc: After how many minutes is an ongoing qas seen as lost and put back in queue. Use negative to disable.

properties.name: TypeInformation
properties.doc: Get information about this class.

methods.doc: Return true if the array contains the element using the normal equal operator.

methods.name: Except
methods.doc: Return all elements that does not exist in the other collection.

param.doc: A function to test each element for a condition.

methods.name: FirstOrDefault
methods.doc: Returns the first element in a sequence that satisfies a specified condition or empty if not found.

param.name: selector
param.doc: A function to test each element for a condition.

methods.name: Foreach

param.name: function
param.doc: A function that takes 1 parameter of the types in the array, and an optional 2nd parameter that is the index

methods.doc: Counts the number of times a given Number object exists in the Array. Can only use if all the elements are of type Number

methods.name: OrderBy
methods.doc: Sorts the elements of a sequence in ascending order by using a specified comparer.

param.name: comparer
param.doc: Function that compares two objects of the same type. Must return a signed integer that indicates the relative values of first param A and second param B. Value Less than 0 : A is less than B.Value 0 : A equals B.Value Greater than 0 : A is greater than B.It can also be a function that takes 1 parameter and returns a string or number.

methods.name: Randomize
methods.doc: Randomize the order of the elements in the current array. Multiple calls to this may return the same randomization, use a Random object to preserve randomization over multiple calls

methods.name: Randomize
methods.doc: Randomize the order of the elements in the current array.

methods.name: Reverse
methods.doc: Returns an array with all the elements in the opposite order.

param.name: selector

methods.name: SelectMany

param.name: selector
param.doc: A transform function to get each sub array.

methods.name: Take

param.doc: A transform function to get the key of each element.

param.doc: A transform function to get the key of each element.

methods.name: Any
methods.doc: Return true if the array contains the element using the given function.

param.name: predicate
param.doc: A function that takes 1 parameter of the types in the array, and return true/false

methods.name: Contains
methods.doc: Return true if the array contains the element using the normal equal operator.

methods.name: Except
methods.doc: Return all elements that does not exist in the other collection.

methods.name: First
methods.doc: Returns the first element in a sequence that satisfies a specified condition.

param.name: selector
param.doc: A function to test each element for a condition.

methods.name: FirstOrDefault
methods.doc: Returns the first element in a sequence that satisfies a specified condition or empty if not found.

param.name: selector
param.doc: A function to test each element for a condition.

methods.name: Foreach
methods.doc: Filters a sequence of values based on a predicate.

param.name: function
param.doc: A function that takes 1 parameter of the types in the array, and an optional 2nd parameter that is the index

methods.name: Frequency
methods.doc: Counts the number of times a given Number object exists in the Array. Can only use if all the elements are of type Number

methods.name: IndexOf
methods.doc: Return index of the given element using ==, or -1.

methods.name: IndexOfObject
methods.doc: Return index of the given element using references, or -1.

methods.name: IsCharacterArray
methods.doc: check if array is an array of characters

methods.name: IsNumericArray
methods.doc: check if array is an array of integer numbers

methods.name: IsStringArray
methods.doc: check if array is an array of string

methods.name: OrderBy
methods.doc: Sorts the elements of a sequence in ascending order by using a specified comparer.

param.name: comparer
param.doc: Function that compares two objects of the same type. Must return a signed integer that indicates the relative values of first param A and second param B. Value Less than 0 : A is less than B.Value 0 : A equals B.Value Greater than 0 : A is greater than B.It can also be a function that takes 1 parameter and returns a string or number.

methods.name: Randomize
methods.doc: Randomize the order of the elements in the current array. Multiple calls to this may return the same randomization, use a Random object to preserve randomization over multiple calls

methods.name: Randomize
methods.doc: Randomize the order of the elements in the current array.

methods.name: Reverse
methods.doc: Returns an array with all the elements in the opposite order.

methods.name: Save
methods.doc: Save this folder object to the database

methods.name: Select
methods.doc: Projects each element of a sequence into a new form.

param.name: selector
param.doc: A transform function to apply to each element.

methods.name: SelectMany
methods.doc: Projects each array element of a sequence into a new form.

param.name: selector
param.doc: A transform function to get each sub array.

methods.name: Skip
methods.doc: Get all but the n first elements.

methods.name: Take

methods.name: Any
methods.doc: Return true if the array contains the element using the given function.

param.doc: A function that takes 1 parameter of the types in the array, and return true/false

methods.doc: Return true if the array contains the element using the normal equal operator.

methods.doc: Return all elements that does not exist in the other collection.

param.name: selector
param.doc: A function to test each element for a condition.

methods.name: FirstOrDefault
methods.doc: Returns the first element in a sequence that satisfies a specified condition or empty if not found.

param.name: selector
param.doc: A function to test each element for a condition.

methods.doc: Filters a sequence of values based on a predicate.

param.doc: A function that takes 1 parameter of the types in the array, and an optional 2nd parameter that is the index

methods.doc: Return index of the given element using ==, or -1.

methods.doc: Return index of the given element using references, or -1.

methods.doc: check if array is an array of characters

methods.name: IsNumericArray
methods.doc: check if array is an array of integer numbers

methods.name: IsStringArray
methods.doc: check if array is an array of string

methods.name: OrderBy
methods.doc: Sorts the elements of a sequence in ascending order by using a specified comparer.

param.name: comparer
param.doc: Function that compares two objects of the same type. Must return a signed integer that indicates the relative values of first param A and second param B. Value Less than 0 : A is less than B.Value 0 : A equals B.Value Greater than 0 : A is greater than B.It can also be a function that takes 1 parameter and returns a string or number.

methods.doc: Set the values of the table with the given name on the given slide to the values generated by the diagram returned by createCrossDiagram or createFixedCrossTable.

param.name: keepTableWidth
param.doc:
If true, the columnsare split into minor cols. This will keep the width of the table.
If false the columns are cloned, which will keep the size of cols, but table may then exceed the slide width.

param.name: keepTableHeight
param.doc:
If true, the rows are split into minor rows. This will keep the height of the table.
If false the last row is cloned, which will keep the size of rows, but table may then exceed the slide height.

param.name: coloredCells
param.doc: List of array objects in which describes the cell row, column and color specified by color (See Color_fromAny). E.g. {{1, 2, {255,0,0}}, {4, 5, new Color({255,0,0})}, {4, 5, "#FF0000"}}

methods.name: SetTableBackgroundColorPartiallyByHexString
methods.doc: Same as SetTableBackgroundColorPartially.

methods.name: SetTableBackgroundColorPartiallyByRGB
methods.doc: Same as SetTableBackgroundColorPartially.

methods.doc: Set the values of the table with the given name on the given slide to the values given.

param.name: keepTableWidth
param.doc:
If true, the last col is split into minor cols. This will keep the width of the table.
If false the last col is cloned, which will keep the size of cols, but table may then exceed the slide width.

param.name: keepTableHeight
param.doc:
If true, the last row is split into minor rows. This will keep the height of the table.
If false the last row is cloned, which will keep the size of rows, but table may then exceed the slide height.

properties.doc: When should Cati attempt to call this Qas, assuming they are on appointment or retry list.

properties.doc: If meeting or retry, when will this qas be schedule for.

properties.name: CatiList
properties.doc: Which type of cati call. 1 = main, 2 = ongoing, 3 = appointment, 4 = done, 5 = retry.

properties.name: CatiPriority
properties.doc: Priority of call. Only used on mainlist.

properties.doc: When was this qas created.

properties.name: IsInSyncWithQuestionnaire
properties.doc: Return true if the version the Qas was last active on is also the current questionnaire version.

properties.doc: Largest of all the objects in the Array object. Can only use if all the elements are of type Number

properties.name: Min
properties.doc: Smallest of all the objects in the Array object. Can only use if all the elements are of type Number

properties.name: ObjectTypeName
properties.doc: The name of the type of object.

properties.name: QuestionSequence
properties.doc: Get the expected sequence of questions to be viewed following the question group rules etc, but not any CgScript or Conditions, only accurate if IsInSyncWithQuestionnaire is true

properties.name: QuestionSequenceIndex
properties.doc: Get the index into QuestionSequence of what is current question, only accurate if IsInSyncWithQuestionnaire is true

properties.name: QuestionnaireResourceId
properties.doc: Resource Id of the questionnaire.

properties.name: SampleRuleId
properties.doc: Id of the sample rule

properties.name: StartDate
properties.doc: When was this qas started.

properties.name: Status
properties.doc: Current status of qas. See UserProjectQuestionnaire_Status_xxx/RPQ_Status_xxx.

properties.name: Sum
properties.doc: Sum of all the objects in the Array object. Can only use if all the elements are of type Number

properties.name: Test
properties.doc: Get/set if test qas.

properties.name: TypeInformation
properties.doc: Get information about this class.

properties.name: UserId
properties.doc: Get/set user the qas belongs to. May be 0 for anonymous

properties.doc: Get/set user the qas belongs to. May be 0 for anonymous

properties.name: ViewedQuestions
properties.doc: Get the questions the viewed as index into QuestionSequence, only accurate if IsInSyncWithQuestionnaire is true

QslParser.name: QslParser
QslParser.doc: Parse QSL (Questionnaire Script Language) to questionnaire template.

methods.name: ParseQslAndUpdateQuestionnaireTemplate
methods.doc: Parse a qsl string into an existing questionnaire template and save it, possibly wiping all questions before.

param.name: qsl
param.doc: The QSL containing the changes to the questionnaire template

param.name: questionnaireTemplateResourceId
param.doc: Resource id of the questionnaire to update

param.name: language
param.doc: Which language isocode does the text updates belong to.

param.name: deleteExistingQuestions
param.doc: If set, all questions are removed prior to update and a clean questionnaire template matching the qsl is created, otherwise update existing and add new.

methods.name: ParseQslAndUpdateTextInQuestionnaireTemplate
methods.doc: Parse a qsl string into an existing questionnaire template and update text only. This prevents structure version from being updated, and thus prevents existing QAS from resetting. Saves template after.

param.name: qsl
param.doc: The QSL containing the changes to the questionnaire template

param.name: questionnaireTemplateResourceId
param.doc: Resource id of the questionnaire to update

param.name: language
param.doc: Which language isocode does the text updates belong to.

methods.name: ToString
methods.doc: The string representation of the object.

properties.name: ObjectTypeName
properties.doc: The name of the type of object.

properties.name: TypeInformation
properties.doc: Get information about this class.

methods.name: Any
methods.doc: Return true if the array contains the element using the given function.

param.name: predicate
param.doc: A function that takes 1 parameter of the types in the array, and return true/false

methods.name: Contains
methods.doc: Return true if the array contains the element using the normal equal operator.

methods.name: Except
methods.doc: Return all elements that does not exist in the other collection.

methods.name: First
methods.doc: Returns the first element in a sequence that satisfies a specified condition.

param.name: selector
param.doc: A function to test each element for a condition.

methods.name: FirstOrDefault
methods.doc: Returns the first element in a sequence that satisfies a specified condition or empty if not found.

param.name: selector
param.doc: A function to test each element for a condition.

methods.name: Foreach
methods.doc: Filters a sequence of values based on a predicate.

param.name: function
param.doc: A function that takes 1 parameter of the types in the array, and an optional 2nd parameter that is the index

methods.name: Frequency
methods.doc: Counts the number of times a given Number object exists in the Array. Can only use if all the elements are of type Number

methods.name: IndexOf
methods.doc: Return index of the given element using ==, or -1.

methods.name: IndexOfObject
methods.doc: Return index of the given element using references, or -1.

methods.name: IsCharacterArray
methods.doc: check if array is an array of characters

methods.name: IsNumericArray
methods.doc: check if array is an array of integer numbers

methods.name: IsStringArray
methods.doc: check if array is an array of string

methods.name: OrderBy
methods.doc: Sorts the elements of a sequence in ascending order by using a specified comparer.

param.name: comparer
param.doc: Function that compares two objects of the same type. Must return a signed integer that indicates the relative values of first param A and second param B. Value Less than 0 : A is less than B.Value 0 : A equals B.Value Greater than 0 : A is greater than B.It can also be a function that takes 1 parameter and returns a string or number.

methods.name: Randomize
methods.doc: Randomize the order of the elements in the current array. Multiple calls to this may return the same randomization, use a Random object to preserve randomization over multiple calls

methods.name: Randomize
methods.doc: Randomize the order of the elements in the current array.

methods.name: Reverse
methods.doc: Returns an array with all the elements in the opposite order.

methods.name: Select
methods.doc: Projects each element of a sequence into a new form.

param.name: selector
param.doc: A transform function to apply to each element.

methods.name: SelectMany
methods.doc: Projects each array element of a sequence into a new form.

param.name: selector
param.doc: A transform function to get each sub array.

methods.name: Skip
methods.doc: Get all but the n first elements.

methods.name: Take
methods.doc: Get the n first elements.

methods.name: ToDictionary
methods.doc: Return a dictionary with the elements of the array.

param.name: keySelector
param.doc: A transform function to get the key of each element.

methods.name: ToDictionary
methods.doc: Return a dictionary with the elements of the array.

param.name: keySelector
param.doc: A transform function to get the key of each element.

param.name: valueSelector
param.doc: A transform function to get the value of each element.

methods.name: ToString
methods.doc: The string representation of the object.

methods.name: Where
methods.doc: Filters a sequence of values based on a predicate.

param.name: predicate
param.doc: A function that takes 1 parameter of the types in the array, and an optional 2nd parameter that is the index and return true/false

methods.doc: Backward-compatible indexer
Backward-compatible indexer

ResourceTransaction.name: ResourceTransaction
ResourceTransaction.doc: Do accounting on resources to keep track of tickets, points, licenses etc. E.g. Keep track of group X (byResource) bought n licences to product Y (onResource).

constructors.doc: Latest transaction on a given resource by a given resource

param.name: onResourceId
param.doc: The resource that the points are kept on

param.name: byResourceId
param.doc: The resource that the uses points. May be 0

methods.name: Insert
methods.doc: Insert additional points. Inserting to unlimited unsets the unlimited. Returns the new balance.

methods.name: RemoveAll
methods.doc: Set points to 0.

methods.name: SetUnlimited
methods.doc: Set points to unlimited.

methods.name: ToString
methods.doc: The string representation of the object.

methods.name: Transactions
methods.doc: Get list of all transactions.

methods.name: Transfer
methods.doc: Transfer points from one byResource to another. Transfer to unlimited unsets the unlimited. Returns the new balance of target.

param.name: byResourceIdTarget
param.doc: Id of recipient of the points

param.name: amount
param.doc: Number of points to transfer. Use -1 to set target to unlimited

methods.name: Withdraw
methods.doc: Withdraw points. Returns the new balance.

staticMethods.name: ResourceTransaction_getBalances
staticMethods.doc: Fetch current balance on the given list of resources. Returns a dictionary of onResourceId, and value is a dictionary where keys are either the given byResourceIds or all known and the value is balance.

param.name: onResourceIds
param.doc: List of ids to lookup balances on

param.name: byResourceIds
param.doc: List of ids to lookup who changed balances on. May be empty to fetch all

properties.name: Amount
properties.doc: Amount of this transaction. Negative if withdrawal

properties.name: Balance
properties.doc: Current balance after this transaction

properties.name: ByResourceId
properties.doc: Resource id of the 'user'

properties.name: Date
properties.doc: Date of transaction. Empty if no transactions ever performed

properties.name: Description
properties.doc: Description of transaction

properties.name: IsUnlimited
properties.doc: True if has unlimited licences

properties.name: ObjectTypeName
properties.doc: The name of the type of object.

properties.name: OnResourceId
properties.doc: Resource id of the 'product'

properties.name: TypeInformation
properties.doc: Get information about this class.

methods.name: ToString
methods.doc: The string representation of the object.

param.doc: Resource id of the group mark as role

RoleExtensionDocumentation.name: RoleExtensionDocumentation
RoleExtensionDocumentation.doc: Documents how a given role extension can be called

methods.name: ToString
methods.doc: The string representation of the object.

properties.name: Description
properties.doc: A short description of the functionality for an admin user to better understand what it actually does.

properties.name: IncludeChildrenInPath
properties.doc: If true and LimitToPath is set, then LimitToPath applies to any role with the path as prefix. Default is false.

properties.name: LimitToPath
properties.doc: If set, only roles in a given path are applicable for this role extensions. Default is Empty.

properties.name: Name
properties.doc: The name of the functionality for an admin user to see.

properties.name: ObjectTypeName
properties.doc: The name of the type of object.

properties.name: Parameters
properties.doc: Documentation for possible parameters.

properties.name: PathIsRelative
properties.doc: If true, the path is a postfix on the Top level parent that the role extension is defined on. Default is true.

properties.name: PermissionRequired
properties.doc: Minimum access required on a user/role to be able to do it's function: 2 = needs read access, 4 = write access, 6 = full access. Default is 4.

properties.name: Result
properties.doc: Documentation for return value of calling the script.

properties.name: ShowResultInGrid
properties.doc: If true, values returned by this script in query mode is suitable to be shown in the user/role grid, no parameters are allowed if true. Default is true.

properties.name: TypeInformation

param.doc: Function that compares two objects of the same type. Must return a signed integer that indicates the relative values of first param A and second param B. Value Less than 0 : A is less than B.Value 0 : A equals B.Value Greater than 0 : A is greater than B.It can also be a function that takes 1 parameter and returns a string or number.

properties.name: CountAnswerIncluded
properties.doc: Enables or disables the count total answers row in table diagrams. This row is a statistical row shown at the bottom of the table. The value of the row tells us how many answers were given to the question. This may be the same as the total number of respondents, but given that the question type is multi, it may also be that it was more than this, since each respondent then can give more than one answer to one question.

properties.doc: Calculate the value of the middle observation. In case of an even number of observations the median is the average of the two values on each side of the middle point. Note that the median is NOT calculated based on the categories, but using all data in the dcs.All empty values are ignored.

properties.doc: ShowRealTotalRespondent

properties.doc: Returns the total percentage values (should be sum of pct values OR always is 100%), which can be shown for table diagrams. The values tells us percentage of answers were given to the question. This may be the same as the total percentage values, but given that the question type is MULTI, it may also be that it was more than this, since each respondent then can give more than one answer to one question.

properties.doc: Enable/Disable showing the total Row in absolute numbers, even though it is a pct column
